title: system.run approvals did not bind PATH-token executable identity
description: The sanitizeSystemRunParamsForForwarding function in the gateway validates approval records for system.run commands but trusts the caller-supplied command, rawCommand, cwd, agentId, and sessionKey parameters verbatim when forwarding. After an approval is granted for a specific command, the caller can substitute different values for these fields before execution, running a different command or in a different directory than what was approved. The approval binding only verifies the run ID and node/device identity, not the immutable execution plan.
